assignments.twist: generalized predator-prey with arbitrary response functions f_i, sought for exact analytical solvability
the LV class is recast as a conservative Hamiltonian system with a conserved H and canonical (q,p) equations

core_model_summary: A generalized two-species predator-prey competition system, framed within a conserved Hamiltonian formalism, whose special solvable case admits an exact elementary-function solution.
